name: RSS → Google Docs → NotebookLM → Qwen Brief → Telegram

nodes.name: Poll Every 30 Minutes
nodes.notes: Adjust interval per source. Trusted sources run every 30 min; slow sources (changelog, newsletter) run every 24 h via their own cron expressions.

nodes.name: Fetch RSS Feed
nodes.notes: Runs once per source. continueOnFail=true so one dead feed does not abort the whole run.

nodes.name: Keyword Filter
nodes.notes: Drops off-topic items. Trusted sources (anthropic-blog, linear-changelog) bypass keyword scoring.

nodes.name: Any Items Pass Filter?
nodes.notes: Short-circuits the run if nothing passed the keyword filter. Prevents empty Google Docs appends.

nodes.name: Get Google Doc
nodes.notes: Retrieves document to find the current end index for append. GDOC_INTELLIGENCE_DOC_ID env var must be set.

nodes.name: Trigger NotebookLM Refresh
nodes.notes: Calls the notebooklm-refresh-trigger webhook. continueOnFail=true — brief generation proceeds even if NLM refresh fails.

parameters.name: messages

nodes.name: Generate Qwen Brief
nodes.notes: Calls Qwen 3 14B via OpenAI-compatible endpoint. 120 s timeout. Set QWEN_API_URL, QWEN_API_KEY, QWEN_MODEL in n8n env.
